---
title: "Week 05"
---

::: {style="color: #F66D7A"}
### Monday (3/09)
:::

**Topics**

-   Geometric and Negative Binomial Distributions
-   Distributions in `R`

**Daily assignment**

To be completed and submitted to Canvas by 9:00am

-   [Daily assignment](daily/DA_12.pdf)

**Class activity**

-   Geometric/first success [practice problems](class/CA_12.pdf)
-   Distributions in `R` (filled in version [here](class/discrete_dists_R.qmd))

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: {style="color: #F66D7A"}
### Wednesday (3/11)
:::

**Topics**

-   Indicator variables
-   Fundamental Bridge

**Daily assignment**

To be completed and submitted to Canvas by 9:00am

-   Daily assignment

**Class activity**

-   Class activity

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: {style="color: #F66D7A"}
### Friday (3/13)
:::

**Midterm 1!**
